ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event log */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was generated */,
  "device_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device generating the event */,
  "device_product" TEXT /* Product of the device generating the event */,
  "version_level" INTEGER /* Version level of the device */,
  "message_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event message */,
  "signature_id" TEXT /* Signature identifier associated with the event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "extensions" TEXT /* Additional details and extensions related to the event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device that generated the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location where the event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string if applicable */,
  "threat_score" INTEGER /* Threat score assigned to the event */,
  "is_anomaly" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "device_product" TEXT /* Product name of the device */,
  "device_version" TEXT /* Version of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last event generated by the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for emergency contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the alert */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the rule that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES alert_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "target_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the target system if applicable */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string used to perform the action */,
  "is_anomaly" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the action is an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert rule */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rule is active or inactive */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for notification settings */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user these settings apply to */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for SMS notifications */,
  "threshold_level" TEXT /* Level of alerts that trigger notifications (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alerts the user wants to receive */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "last_notified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last notification sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Default severity level for the event type */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event type is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
